title: Chamaecrista lavradiiflora
taxonomy: Chamaecrista lavradiiflora is classified as a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a member of the genus Chamaecrista, which includes several species of shrubs and herbs. Chamaecrista lavradiiflora is native to tropical Africa, where it grows in a variety of habitats. The plant is likely to be further classified into more specific taxonomic categories, such as a species within a section or subsection of the Chamaecrista genus. However, without more specific information, the exact classification of Chamaecrista lavradiiflora is not fully known.
uses: Chamaecrista lavradiiflora is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
